rag_no_rag_summary: The AI said the screen is not covered after 14 months because the standard warranty is usually 12 months. It also mentioned Samsung Care+ might cover it.
rag_grounded_summary: The AI used the provided document and correctly said the screen is not covered unless the customer has an active Samsung Care+ plan. It gave a support reply based only on the document.
stretch_notes: If the document says the Galaxy Watch6 has a 24-month warranty covering cracked screens, but the model already "knows" it's usually 12 months, the RAG document wins because the model should follow the provided information
